fame_reason: Senior RSF commander, death confirmed by Reuters (2024).
summary_brief: Senior RSF commander killed in clashes near Wad Madani, Sudan, on 27 Feb 2024.
death_context: Killed in combat (fighting near Wad Madani).

citation_text: Reuters: a senior RSF commander, Yagoub Ibrahim Mousa, was killed in fighting near Wad Madani in February 2024.
